title: openpouch error result
description: The universal failure shape of every openpouch CLI command (--json) and MCP tool. Contract: `required` fields are guaranteed; results evolve ADDITIVELY (new optional fields may appear — do not reject unknown properties). Exit codes are documented in CLI.md.

summary.description: Plain-language, jargon-free text written for the (possibly non-technical) human — relay it verbatim.

category.description: Stable machine-readable failure class. `network` = the openpouch API could not be reached at all (DNS/refused/timeout/TLS) — an environment problem, not an app problem.

fix.description: Actionable guidance written for agents — always present.

suggestedCommand.description: Present only when there is exactly ONE unambiguous, directly-runnable next command (no placeholders).

failureLogs.description: On a failed dynamic/static-build deploy: the last lines of the server-captured build/startup output — the failed record is removed server-side, so this is the only window into WHY. Feed your self-repair loop from here.

approvalRequest.description: Present with category `approval-required`: the pending human-approval request (ask your human to run `openpouch approve <id>` in their own terminal).

feedbackHint.description: Optional, error-results only: how to send opt-in friction feedback. Never required, never blocks.
